title: TC001-Admin dashboard loads and shows metrics cards
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the Admin Dashboard and see the four overview metric cards rendered.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Type the username and password into their inputs and click the 'Sign in' button to attempt login.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div[4]/form/div/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('nandika')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div[4]/form/div[2]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('klp123')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div[4]/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Verify we are on the admin page
        assert "/admin" in frame.url
        
        # Verify the 'Galleries' overview/link is visible
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/nav/a[3]').nth(0)
        assert await elem.is_visible(), 'Expected "Galleries" to be visible on the Admin Dashboard'
        
        # Report missing features that are required by the test plan but not present in the available elements list
        raise AssertionError('Unable to assert visibility for "Active Bookings" and "Total Bookings": corresponding elements/xpaths are not present in the provided available elements. Task marked as done.')
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
